title: Pass 5.D.4: ferrotorch-data fencepost loops without matched-count guard (28 sites)
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-data audit, TEST_INTEGRITY.

tests/conformance_data_loader.rs (and _dataset.rs, _sampler.rs) — every test follows: `for fx in fixtures_of_kind(...) { if subtest != "X" { continue; } ... assert ... }`. If a fixture goes missing or is renamed, the test silently passes with zero assertions. No `assert!(matched > 0)` guard. 28 such fenceposts in _loader.rs alone.

Acceptance:
- Add a matched-count assertion in each fixture-loop test (or a shared helper)
- Discriminating sabotage probe: rename a fixture and confirm the test now fails.
